string.text: Crouch key always crouches. Walk/Low Crouch key always goes prone. Bind Walk below for the only way to walk. Sprint is unchanged. Uses your game crouch/walk toggle or hold settings.
Intercept crouch and walk/low-crouch keys and map them directly to crouch and prone poses.
Only way to enter walk mode. Toggle walk: press again to stand. Hold walk: stand on release.
Show current pose in the debug overlay.
Write pose changes to the game log file.
